title: Korak 46

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''

for char in text.lower():
    if char == ' ':
        encrypted_text += char
    else:
        index = alphabet.find(char)
        new_index = (index + shift) % 26
        encrypted_text += alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''

for char in text.lower():
    if char == ' ':
        encrypted_text += char
    else:
        index = alphabet.find(char)
        new_index = (index + shift) % 26
        encrypted_text += alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text)

description:
Ako želite da unesete više karaktera u niz karaktera alphabet, kao što su brojevi ili specijalni znakovi, otvorićete da je neophodno ručno promeniti desni operand modulo operacije.

Promeni 26 u len(alphabet) ili izbegni ovaj problem.
